steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Adding the two equations cancels the $y+6$ terms.
$$(x-3)-5(y+6)=128$$
$$(x-3)+5(y+6)=467$$
$$2(x-3)=595$$

steps.title: Scale to the target
steps.content:
The question asks for $6(x-3)$, which is $3$ times $2(x-3)$.
$$6(x-3)=3\cdot595=1785$$
The answer is 1785.
